src/main/resources/application.yml:
spring:
  application:
    name: demo-spring
  threads:
    virtual:
      enabled: true
  servlet:
    multipart:
      max-file-size: 1MB
      max-request-size: 10MB
  mvc:
    servlet:
      load-on-startup: 1

server:
  address: 0.0.0.0
  port: 8080
  compression:
    enabled: true
    min-response-size: 2KB
  servlet:
    context-path: /demo/spring
  tomcat:
    threads:
      max: 200
      max-queue-capacity: 800

logging:
  pattern:
    console: "%d{yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSS} %-5level [%thread] [%X{traceid:-N/A}] [%X{userid:-N/A}] %-40.40logger{39} : %msg%n"
